Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Liability insurance is a key financial service that enables industries and enterprises to manage risk, supporting Target 9.3 (access of enterprises to financial services).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The study of tort law ("侵權行為法基礎") and direct action ("直接請求權") relates to providing legal remedies for victims, supporting Target 10.3 (ensure equal opportunity).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course focuses on legal frameworks like "tort law" (侵權行為法基礎) and "legal disputes" (法律爭議), which are core components of Target 16.3 (promote rule of law, ensure access to justice).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course involves an "industry expert" (應請業師分享), demonstrating a partnership between academia and the private sector for capacity-building, which aligns with the spirit of Target 17.17.
